answer.text:
Dear Henny,

Could you please specify which additional permissions are required?
Based on our check, the current access should already cover the daily operations. If any special permissions are needed, please let us know specifically. Thanks!



Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Friday, February 27, 2026 at 10:09

Cc: Michael Zhao/CUL-PH <michaelzhao@culines.com>, Allan Ng/CUL-SG <allanng@culines.com>, Julia Zhu/CUL-CN/Agency Mgt <juliazhu@culines.c
